title: Best-Found Candidates
description: Top-K candidates ranked by composite score across all iterations completed so far. Updated after each iteration's findings.json is finalized. Issue #168.

top_k.description: Best candidates seen so far, ordered by score descending.

candidate_id.description: Stable identifier for the candidate. Combines iteration + arm + per-arm metadata.candidate_id when available.

components.description: Per-metric contribution to the score (weight × observed value).

arm_id.description: Which arm produced this candidate (h-main, h-ablation, etc.).

k.description: Top-K cap requested by the caller.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent update.
